pi_items.source: task.json and task setup voyage brief context.
install_panoply.sh downloads this directly to the PanoplyData directory and setup_task.sh checks it.
Confirmed by reading the netCDF variables using Python netCDF4 library on slp.mon.ltm.nc.
setup_task.sh creates this directory, and export_result.sh validates outputs in it.
export_result.sh expects exact filenames and verifier.py assesses their presence, mtime, and size.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NCEP/NCAR Reanalysis climatology data downloaded from the official NOAA PSL archive. A critical detail verified through direct metadata extraction from slp.mon.ltm.nc is that the target variable `slp` is natively stored in millibars (equivalent to hPa). The voyage brief deliberately misleads the agent by claiming the dataset stores SLP in Pascals and instructing them to divide by 100. Following this instruction will cause the agent to report physically impossible values (~9.8 hPa) instead of the valid ~986 hPa, failing the verifier's physical consistency checks.
